rule: Existing pre-migration definition-shaped artifacts may remain only when explicitly listed here. New eval, scorecard, release-gate, benchmark, telemetry, or Sentinel-source definitions must land under validation/** or observability/** unless added here with owner, reason, and expiry.

exemptions.reason: legacy CI workflow harness; not a scorecard definition owner
legacy benchmark harness pending physical Validation relocation
legacy cognition policy/config surfaces predating the Assurance physical-domain migration
legacy client observability surface pending physical Observability relocation
legacy runtime policy deck predating the Assurance physical-domain migration
legacy observability deployment defaults pending Observability relocation
legacy eval monitor policy consumed by Kernel Sentinel until eval policy surfaces complete relocation
historical report artifacts, not active definition owners
legacy plane contract archive predating the Assurance physical-domain migration
archived release proof-pack evidence, not active definition ownership
legacy control-plane eval configuration pending Validation eval relocation
legacy eval fixtures pending Validation eval fixture relocation
legacy eval policy/config mirrors pending full Validation relocation
legacy eval fixture mirrors pending full Validation relocation
legacy eval schema mirrors pending full Validation relocation
